mapper.select: select car_id as carId, brand, model, year, mileage, price, registered_at as registeredAt from cars
mapper.insert: insert into cars(car_id, brand, model, year, mileage, price, registered_at) values (#{carId}, #{brand}, #{model}, #{year}, #{mileage}, #{price}, #{registeredAt})
mapper.update: update cars set brand=#{brand}, model=#{model}, year=#{year}, mileage=#{mileage}, price=#{price}, registered_at=#{registeredAt} where car_id=#{carId}
mapper.select:
select car_id as carId, brand, model, year, mileage, price, registered_at as registeredAt from cars where brand in
#{item}
select brand as brand_name, COUNT(*) as brand_count from cars group by brand
select car_id as carId, brand, model, year, mileage, price, registered_at as registeredAt from cars where year between #{startYear} and #{endYear}
